The Funding Applications included are Consolidated, Competitive, Student Intervention, Career-Technical and Adult Education, Adult Basic and Literacy Education and Community School. Other documents includes budgets, budget details, nonpublic services and other related pages.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 15 years after final action is taken on file,

series_description: Surveys are used to evaluate internal and external customer satisfaction, measure outcomes, and develop performance measures and benchmarks. They can be used in either a paper or electronic format. The answers are compiled and used to upgrade, monitor, or improve existing services within the agency. At times, they may contain some personal and confidential information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 1 year ; Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: This record series includes correspondence, research, information and materials to support the efforts of the career technical planning district (CTPD), which demonstrates effective, sustainable, and coordinated educational programs for approved career fields and course offerings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five (5) years ; Electronic: Retain five (5) years

series_description: Official statement of Attorney General's views on a legal question issued to the Ohio Department of Education that bear the signature of the Attorney General with all pertinent materials attached thereto.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently. ; Paper: Retain permanently.

series_description: Official statement of Attorney General's views on a legal question prepared by Assistant Attorney General of the Opinions Section. (Therefore, an informal letter may not be described as an official statement of the Attorney General's views on a question and should not be cited as an "Attorney General opinion".
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative or legal value ; Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative or legal value

series_description: Records related to program office projects/engagements, which explore administrative, process modifications, new technologies, etc., to improve the administration or enhance the integrity of the programs processes or procedures.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 5 years

series_description: All records supporting how grantees utilized grant funds on allowable grant expenditures during the federal and state grant period of availability. Any unused funds are reported on the FER and, if permitted, moved forward for use in the next fiscal year.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain six (6) years after grant activity ; Electronic: Retain six (6) years after grant activity

series_description: All records supporting grantee request for funds based on allowable expenditures under an approved state or federal grant.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain six (6) years after grant activity ; Electronic: Retain six (6) years after grant activity

series_description: This record series includes drafts (first, second, etc.) of letters, documents, reports, or any other office documents. This schedule is intended for use by all divisions, centers, offices, units and sections within the Department.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until final document produced. ; Paper: Retain until final document produced.

series_description: This record series contains related documents for an accredited training sponsor program. The file may include, but not limited to; training sign-in sheets, registration forms with release dates, exams, member card, certificates and course completion records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years ; Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: This records series includes, but not limited to, records developed by, or under contract for, the Ohio Department of Education, in support of the Department's public affairs or public relations activities.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain two (2) years ; Paper: Retain two (2) years

series_description: This record series covers postings to Social Media sites including, but not limited to, Facebook, GovDelivery, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter, and You-Tube. This information includes, but is not limited to, press releases, videos, events, and general information about the Ohio Department of Education. Social Media is made to market the agency and share information that is of interest to the citizens of Ohio. Information posted that falls under a separate retention schedule will be kept according to that retention schedule.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until updated or no longer of administrative value

series_description: This record series includes electronic and paper records for school and district performance awards presented by the SBOE, Ohio Department of Education, and USDOE. May include, but not limited to Overall A Award, All A Award, Momentum Award, Schools of Honor:( High Progress, High Performing), Schools Of Promise, Blue Ribbon Schools, Milken National Educator Awards and PAEMST(The Presidential Awards for Excellence in Mathematics and Science Teaching).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 10 years ; Paper: Retain 10 years
